title: Recursive Data Extraction
scenario: Create a recursive function to extract all unique email addresses from a complex nested data structure representing a company's contact list. The output should be a list of unique email addresses in the format ['john.doe@example.com', 'jane.smith@example.com', 'alice.johnson@example.com'].
constraints: Must be a valid Python function definition
The function should handle nested structures of any depth

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the output is a valid Python function definition.
Check if all unique email addresses are correctly extracted.
Verify that the function can handle nested structures of any depth.
